login.title: Welcome to ranzaKord
login.subtitle: Sign in to access your music
login.termsRequired: You must accept the terms and conditions to continue.

terms.introText: Welcome to ranzaKord. By using this application, you agree to these Terms and Conditions. Please read them carefully.
terms.usageText: You agree to use the service only for lawful purposes. You are responsible for all activities that occur under your account.
terms.privacyText: We respect your privacy. Any data collected (such as your playlists and listening history) is solely for the purpose of improving your experience and enabling social features. You can manage your privacy settings in the application.
terms.disclaimerText: This service is provided "as is" without any warranties. The developers are not responsible for any issues arising from the use of this application.
terms.placeholder: (These are placeholder terms and conditions for demonstration purposes.)

sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.

callback.error: Sign in failed. Please try again.
callback.successMessage: You have successfully signed in. You can now close this window and return to the application.
callback.openAppManually: Click here if the app didn't open automatically

unauthorized.title: Access Denied
unauthorized.message: Sorry, you can't access this application.
unauthorized.opensource: However, ranzaKord is completely open-source! You can clone the repository, run it locally, and modify it without any limitations.
